mapper.sql: INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID

WHERE IB.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL
AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = #{boardTypeCd}
AND UPPER(IB.POST_SJ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(IB.POST_CN, #{keyword}, 1, 1) > 0
AND (UPPER(IB.POST_SJ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(IB.POST_CN, #{keyword}, 1, 1) > 0)
AND UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND (UPPER(IB.POST_SJ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(IB.POST_CN, #{keyword}, 1, 1) > 0 OR UPPER(M.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT IB.POST_SN , IB.INSTR_USER_ID , IB.WRTR_USER_ID , IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD , IB.POST_SJ , IB.INQ_CNT , IB.ATCH_FILE_ID , IB.REG_DT , IB.MDFCN_DT , IB.RGTR_ID , IB.LAST_MDFR_ID , IB.USE_YN , M.USER_NAME , IQ.ANSW_YN FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN
ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB

SELECT IB.POST_SN , IB.INSTR_USER_ID , IB.WRTR_USER_ID , IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD , IB.POST_SJ , IB.POST_CN , IB.INQ_CNT , IB.ATCH_FILE_ID , IB.REG_DT , IB.MDFCN_DT , IB.RGTR_ID , IB.LAST_MDFR_ID , IB.USE_YN , M.USER_NAME FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL

SELECT IQ.ANSW_YN AS answYn, IQ.ANSW_CN AS answCn, M.USER_NAME AS answrUserNm, TO_CHAR(IQ.ANSW_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS answDt FROM INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON IQ.ANSWR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE IQ.POST_SN = #{postSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INSTRUCTOR_QNA (POST_SN, ANSW_YN, SECR_YN) VALUES (#{postSn}, 'N', 'N')
mapper.update: MERGE INTO INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ USING DUAL ON (IQ.POST_SN = #{postSn}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ANSW_CN = #{answCn}, ANSWR_USER_ID = #{answrUserId}, ANSW_DT = SYSDATE, ANSW_YN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (POST_SN, ANSW_CN, ANSWR_USER_ID, ANSW_DT, ANSW_YN, SECR_YN) VALUES (#{postSn}, #{answCn}, #{answrUserId}, SYSDATE, 'Y', 'N')
mapper.select:
SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD, IB.POST_SJ, IB.POST_CN, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.REG_DT, IB.MDFCN_DT, IB.USE_YN, M.USER_NAME FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
WHERE IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'NOTICE' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'NOTICE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD, IB.POST_SJ, IB.POST_CN, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.REG_DT, IB.MDFCN_DT, IB.USE_YN, M.USER_NAME FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD, IB.POST_SJ, IB.POST_CN, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.ATCH_FILE_ID, IB.REG_DT, IB.MDFCN_DT, IB.USE_YN, M.USER_NAME FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
WHERE IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'DATAROOM' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'DATAROOM' AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD, IB.POST_SJ, IB.POST_CN, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.ATCH_FILE_ID, IB.REG_DT, IB.MDFCN_DT, IB.USE_YN, M.USER_NAME FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.POST_SJ, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.REG_DT, IB.USE_YN, IB.CLASS_SN, M.USER_NAME, IQ.ANSW_YN, IQ.SECR_YN FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND IB.WRTR_USER_ID = #{writerUserId}
ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.POST_SJ, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.REG_DT, IB.USE_YN, IB.CLASS_SN, M.USER_NAME, IQ.ANSW_YN, IQ.SECR_YN FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' AND IB.WRTR_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT IB.POST_SN, IB.INSTR_USER_ID, IB.WRTR_USER_ID, IB.POST_SJ, IB.POST_CN, IB.INQ_CNT, IB.REG_DT, IB.USE_YN, IB.CLASS_SN, M.USER_NAME, IQ.ANSW_YN, IQ.SECR_YN, IQ.ANSW_CN, IQ.ANSWR_USER_ID, IQ.ANSW_DT, AM.USER_NAME AS ANSWR_USER_NM FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB
LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER AM ON IQ.ANSWR_USER_ID = AM.USER_ID WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INSTRUCTOR_QNA (POST_SN, ANSW_YN, SECR_YN) VALUES (#{postSn}, 'N', 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE INSTRUCTOR_QNA SET ANSW_CN = #{answCn}, ANSWR_USER_ID = #{answrUserId}, ANSW_DT = SYSDATE, ANSW_YN = 'Y' WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE IB.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' AND IQ.ANSW_YN = 'N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT IB.POST_SN AS postSn, IB.POST_SJ AS title, IB.REG_DT AS regDt, LOWER(IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD) AS boardType FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON I.INSTR_USER_ID = IB.INSTR_USER_ID WHERE I.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD IN ('NOTICE', 'QNA', 'DATAROOM') AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON IB.INSTR_USER_ID = I.INSTR_USER_ID
LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN
WHERE I.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = #{boardTypeCd} AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND IQ.SECR_YN = 'N'

SELECT IB.POST_SN AS postSn, IB.POST_SJ AS title, TO_CHAR(IB.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDt, IB.INQ_CNT AS viewCount, M.USER_NAME AS writerName, IQ.ANSW_YN AS answerYn, CASE WHEN IB.ATCH_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasFile FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON IB.INSTR_USER_ID = I.INSTR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' WHERE I.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = #{boardTypeCd} AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND IQ.SECR_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT IB.POST_SN AS postSn, IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD AS boardTypeCd, IB.POST_SJ AS title, IB.POST_CN AS content, M.USER_NAME AS writerName, TO_CHAR(IB.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regDt, IB.INQ_CNT AS viewCount, CASE WHEN IB.ATCH_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasFile, IQ.ANSW_YN AS answerYn, IQ.ANSW_CN AS answerContent, AM.USER_NAME AS answererName, TO_CHAR(IQ.ANSW_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS answerDt FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON IB.INSTR_USER_ID = I.INSTR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER AM ON IQ.ANSWR_USER_ID = AM.USER_ID WHERE I.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (IQ.POST_SN IS NULL OR IQ.SECR_YN = 'N')

SELECT IB.POST_SN AS "postSn", IB.POST_SJ AS "postSj", I.INSTR_UUID AS "instrUuid", MI.USER_NAME AS "instrUserNm", IQ.ANSW_YN AS "answYn", IQ.SECR_YN AS "secrYn", TO_CHAR(IB.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "regDt" FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON I.INSTR_USER_ID = IB.INSTR_USER_ID JOIN MEMBER MI ON MI.USER_ID = IB.INSTR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN INSTRUCTOR_QNA IQ ON IQ.POST_SN = IB.POST_SN WHERE IB.WRTR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND IB.CLASS_SN IS NULL AND IB.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD WHERE WRTR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_TYPE_CD = 'QNA' AND CLASS_SN IS NULL AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE INSTRUCTOR_BOARD SET INQ_CNT = INQ_CNT + 1 WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT CAF.ATCH_FILE_DTL_SN AS atchFileDtlSn, CAF.ORGN_FILE_NM AS fileName, CAF.SAVE_PATH_NM AS fileUrl FROM CMMT_ATCH_FILE_DTL CAF INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB ON IB.ATCH_FILE_ID = CAF.ATCH_FILE_ID WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND CAF.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CAF.ATCH_FILE_DTL_SN ASC
